introSection: Big Apple is a Pinfari steel kiddie roller coaster located at Great Yarmouth Pleasure Beach in Great Yarmouth, Norfolk, England, UK. It was previously located at Alton Towers in Staffordshire from 1982 to 1997. While located at Alton Towers, the ride was called Mini Apple.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Follows the standard Big Apple / Wacky Worm layout and goes through a giant apple.

sections.title: Colour scheme
sections.content: At Alton Towers the ride was painted entirely white and at Great Yarmouth the track was painted green and the supports yellow. It has since been repainted and now has yellow track and orange supports.

fullText:
Big Apple is a Pinfari steel kiddie roller coaster located at Great Yarmouth Pleasure Beach in Great Yarmouth, Norfolk, England, UK. It was previously located at Alton Towers in Staffordshire from 1982 to 1997. While located at Alton Towers, the ride was called Mini Apple.

Follows the standard Big Apple / Wacky Worm layout and goes through a giant apple.

At Alton Towers the ride was painted entirely white and at Great Yarmouth the track was painted green and the supports yellow. It has since been repainted and now has yellow track and orange supports.
